pi_items.source: Sygic GPS Navigation documentation confirms 2D mode available where tilt value of 0 degrees = top-down view from above. Sygic Maps SDK documentation and user manuals confirm this functionality.

Sygic GPS Navigation documentation and user manuals explicitly state '2D mode with north up' is an available display mode. Users can tap compass to return map to north-up position. SDK documentation confirms NorthUp rotation mode is supported.
Script analysis: path is used consistently in setup_task.sh (line 15 deletion) and export_result.sh (lines 32, 50) for storing settings screenshot
Script analysis: path is used consistently in setup_task.sh (line 16 deletion) and export_result.sh (lines 33, 51) for storing final map view screenshot

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to configure Sygic GPS Navigation (package com.sygic.aura) to use a 2D North-Up map view. Sygic GPS Navigation supports both 2D perspective (tilt value of 0 degrees for top-down view) and North-Up orientation as confirmed in official documentation and user manuals. The app offers a combined '2D mode with north up' display mode selectable during navigation. The task specifies saving a settings confirmation screenshot to /sdcard/tasks/set_map_2d_north_up/settings_confirmation.png and a final map view screenshot to /sdcard/tasks/set_map_2d_north_up/final_map_view.png. The data is not synthetic—the task operates on the real Sygic GPS Navigation application available on Google Play Store (com.sygic.aura package).
